Engaged to others, two cruise-ship passengers (Cary Grant, Deborah Kerr) plan to reunite six months later atop the Empire State Building.
programme.title: An Affair to Remember

programme.desc: A sheriff's meek wife (Vera Miles) makes a run for the Mexican border with an outlaw (Sam Elliott) her husband was going to hang.
programme.title: Molly and Lawless John

programme.desc: A harmonica player (James Stewart) woos a landlady's daughter (Paulette Goddard) and joins a conductor's (Horace Heidt) orchestra.
programme.title: Pot o' Gold

programme.desc: Ax murders follow a heart attack at an Irish castle full of mourners (William Campbell, Luana Anders, Bart Patton).
programme.title: Dementia 13

programme.desc: In order to help bring Nazis to justice, a U.S. agent brings a traitor's daughter to Rio de Janeiro to seduce an exiled Nazi.
programme.title: Notorious

programme.desc: When a dirty Scotland Yard cop is linked to a string of robberies across Europe, the agency asks a famous French detective (Alan Arkin) to help them find the culprits.
programme.title: Inspector Clouseau

programme.desc: A runaway wife (Madge Evans), a fugitive (Bruce Cabot) and other plane-crash survivors find a hermit's (John Boles) island.
programme.title: Sinners in Paradise

programme.desc: A student hooker (Annie Potts) in a van picks up a Las Vegas-bound teen (Mark Hamill) on the trail of a stolen Stingray.
programme.title: Corvette Summer

programme.desc: A man in black (Yul Brynner) recruits six hired guns to lead Mexican villagers against the gang of an outlaw (Eli Wallach).
programme.title: The Magnificent Seven

programme.desc: A poor Chicago secretary (Diana Ross) takes the fast lane to fame as a model and a fashion designer.
programme.title: Mahogany

programme.desc: When scientists suspect that an alien force is attacking Earth, they send two spaceships to weaken the enemy.
programme.title: Battle in Outer Space

programme.desc: British pirate William Kidd captures Adm. Blaine's treasure ship and hides the bounty in a cave. Three years later, Kidd, posing as a sea captain, offers his services to the king as an escort ship.
programme.title: Captain Kidd

programme.desc: White liberals must overcome their own latent racism when their strong-willed daughter announces her intention to marry a distinguished black physician.
programme.title: Guess Who's Coming to Dinner

programme.desc: Goofy professor Kelp's potion turns him into Buddy Love, a lounge singer at ease with a coed and a crowd.
programme.title: The Nutty Professor

programme.desc: Mark Twain's boy hero (Tommy Kelly) watches his own funeral with Huck Finn (Jackie Moran) and enters a cave with Becky (Ann Gillis), chased by Injun Joe.
programme.title: The Adventures of Tom Sawyer

programme.desc: Unlucky in love, an 1880s Midwestern schoolteacher devotes 50 years of her life to her students.
programme.title: Cheers for Miss Bishop

programme.desc: A massive tidal wave hits the island, bringing stranded Gilligan, Skipper and the rest of the gang back to civilization.
programme.title: Rescue From Gilligan's Island

programme.desc: A space scientist (Hugh Marlowe) figures out how to down a fleet of alien spacecraft looming over Washington, D.C.
programme.title: Earth vs. the Flying Saucers

programme.desc: U.S. soldiers (Van Johnson, John Hodiak, Ricardo Montalban) from all over fight in the Battle of the Bulge.
programme.title: Battleground

programme.desc: A Brooklyn bookkeeper (Don Knotts) falls off a pier, turns into a fish and helps the Navy track U-boats.
programme.title: The Incredible Mr. Limpet

programme.desc: S01 E23 — Joby A stable boy helps Stoney and Ves by subduing two men who are trying to rob the rodeo office.
programme.title: Stoney Burke

programme.desc: Railway police take action when kidnappers choose their busy station as the drop-off point for their ransom money.
programme.title: Union Station

programme.desc: Bumpkins Moe, Larry and Curly Joe (The Three Stooges) help an ice-skating Snow White (Carol Heiss) find her Prince Charming (Edson Stroll).
programme.title: Snow White and the Three Stooges

S01 E116 — Almost Famous Cops respond to a domestic violence call when a man pushes his girlfriend out of a moving vehicle because he did not want her to know it was stolen; a man is arrested for the use of drugs and several outstanding warrants.
programme.title: Cops Reloaded

programme.desc: S01 E117 — Running into Danger An ex-girlfriend breaks into her ex's home when he has a restraining order on her; cops search a car of a man who failed to use his light when changing lanes, but when cops search the car, they find marijuana and cocaine.
programme.title: Cops Reloaded

programme.desc: S01 E118 — Tech 9 Crime A young boy is found in a suspect's apartment after being kidnapped; a suspicious car is pulled over for having the wrong license plate, but when he talks to the officers, they notice he has crack-cocaine in his mouth.
programme.title: Cops Reloaded

programme.desc: S01 E119 — Street Pigeon A burglary suspect, who is in possession of several pieces of jewelry, is found and arrested; officers respond to a call involving a man who is approached by another man who is armed and has just robbed a bank.
programme.title: Cops Reloaded

programme.desc: S01 E112 — Viper in the Floorboards Officers make contact with two suspicious men standing outside a store but when they ask them questions and pat them down, the men try to get away; a woman calls cops because a baby snake is hiding in her closet.
programme.title: Cops Reloaded

programme.desc: S01 E113 — Cupid Scuffle Cops respond to a domestic disturbance call but when they arrive the male flees on foot; two females are arrested in an undercover drug deal of prescription pills.
programme.title: Cops Reloaded

programme.desc: S01 E114 — Copy That Officers respond to a call of a victim claiming she was assaulted by two men because her boyfriend owed them money; a car chase ensues when cops observe a driver who fails to signal a lane change.
programme.title: Cops Reloaded

programme.desc: S01 E115 — Am I Being Punkd? Cops come to arrest a man for drug possession, but he takes off running; cops stop to check up on a car sitting on the side of the road.
programme.title: Cops Reloaded

programme.desc: S01 E116 — Almost Famous Cops respond to a domestic violence call when a man pushes his girlfriend out of a moving vehicle because he did not want her to know it was stolen; a man is arrested for the use of drugs and several outstanding warrants.

programme.desc: S01 E06 — Drunk Teen Teen shocks police with what was hidden in her pajamas.
programme.title: BodyCam by Law&Crime

programme.desc: S01 E04 — Dark Family A young boy is tortured to death by his older brother at the direction of their mother.
programme.title: Interrogations by Law&Crime

programme.desc: S01 E13 — Love & Murder An innocent woman is grilled by an aggressive detective. A man falls for his foster daughter and plots murder.

programme.title: Alive and Well

programme.desc: Reshaping Gilad Janklowicz shows how to reshape thighs and buns, back and abs; Gilad is joined by Angela, Arthur, Nikki and Jim.
programme.title: Total Body Sculpt With Gilad

programme.desc: Exercise for seniors that can be done seated or standing.
programme.title: A New Way 2 Move

programme.desc: S12 E03 — Jack on Trial for Murder Jack is sued and dreams he retains Raymond Burr.
programme.title: The Jack Benny Program

programme.desc: S14 E15 — Peter, Paul and Mary Peter, Paul and Mary adapt the folklore of Jack Benny to a song.
programme.title: The Jack Benny Program

programme.desc: Clock Contestants from California, Missouri and New Zealand compete.
programme.title: You Bet Your Life

programme.desc: Door The secret word is door; guests include an Army quartermaster, a librarian, a mining engineer, a sculptor and a swimmer.
programme.title: You Bet Your Life

programme.desc: Braiding Beautiful From an easy four-strand braid to more advanced multi-strand designs, Mandy shares the techniques behind beautiful homemade challah, making impressive loaves achievable for bakers of every skill level.
programme.title: The Mandylicious Kitchen

programme.desc: Chicago CW Silverberg heads to Chicago, where deep-dish isn't the only thing worth hunting down. From classic delis to unexpected kosher gems tucked throughout the city, you'll never look at the Windy City the same way again.
programme.title: Tripping Kosher

programme.desc: Comedian Howie Mandel Elon Gold speaks with Comedian Howie Mandel about the joys of being a grandparent, his struggles with mental health, and how he honored his late father in the ways of Judaism.
programme.title: Stars of David with Elon Gold

programme.desc: S01 E01 When an African-American future bridegroom begins the process of converting to Judaism, he begins to notice some unexpected changes in his psyche, much to his Jewish fiancée's delight.
programme.title: The Converted Jew

programme.desc: S01 E01 Sapir College Student Asher Schwartz presents the childhood story of Fiddler on the Roof; despite his father's ban of music under his roof, Shalom will do anything to play the fiddle. Narrated in Yiddish by Mike Burstyn.
programme.title: The Fiddle

programme.desc: The real-life origin story of comic books and superheroes by pioneering Jewish Americans from World War II to the present day is colorful and engaging, much like the comics themselves.
programme.title: The Center for Jewish History Presents the Jewish Comics Experience

programme.desc: Envy & Conflict Resolution Hanan Harchol explores Jewish thought on envy and conflict resolution in conversations with his Israeli parents.
programme.title: Jewish Food For Thought

programme.title: Breakthrough with Rod Parsley

programme.title: Good Morning LIVE
programme.desc: Good Morning LIVE is an engaging 30-minute program designed to inspire, inform, and connect viewers to the heart of meaningful living. Hosted by James Epperly, this dynamic show brings together a unique blend of inspirational devotions, thought-provoking interviews, and discussions on current events that matter most to you. Each episode offers uplifting messages to start your day on a positive note, insightful conversations with special guests, and a closer look at how current events align with faith and personal growth. Whether you're seeking encouragement, knowledge, or a deeper connection to today's world, Good Morning LIVE is your source for faith-filled and relevant content. Join us weekday mornings to experience a fresh perspective, inspired by truth and guided by hope.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: Joyce Meyer, one of the world’s leading practicalBible teachers and New York Times bestselling author, shares encouragement andadvice to help people enjoy daily life.

programme.title: Gospel Truth with Andrew Wommack
programme.desc: Thirty-two years ago a man had an encounter with God that changed his life forever. Today, he shares that experience with thousands of people all over the world. The goal of Andrew Wommack is to reach as many people as possible with the love of God and message of grace and faith. He doesn’t measure the success of the ministry by the number of tapes distributed, books sold or offerings received. The real rewards, and proof that God is alive and working in people’s lives, are the many testimonies he receives from the people impacted by his teachings. To find out more, please visit our website at: http://www.awmi.net http://www.awmi.net/ www.awmi.net

programme.title: Rick Renner
programme.desc: Rick Renner is widely known for his interpretation of the Greek New Testament and his engaging teaching style. His teaching is punctuated by a unique ability to draw vividly descriptive word pictures from the Greek that illuminate the Scriptures in a fresh, new way. Rick also distinctively shares Bible principles through contemporary illustrations set against an extensive cultural and historical backdrop of New Testament times. In each episode of “Rick Renner,” Rick teaches in-depth on a passage of Scripture verse by verse, centered around a specific theme that is vitally relevant to the lives of believers who are hungry to dig deeper into the treasures of God’s Word. For more information, visit http://www.renner.org.

programme.title: Manna Fest With Perry Stone
programme.desc: Manna-fest is the weekly television program of Perry Stone that deals with in-depth prophetic and practical studies of the Word of God. As biblical prophecy continues to unfold, you will find Manna-fest to be a resource to help you better understand where we are now in light of Bible prophecy and what the Bible says about the future. Be sure to tune in each week!

programme.title: The James Epperly Show
programme.desc: "The James Epperly Show" is a Christian television program that aims to inspire and uplift viewers through faith-based content. Hosted by Pastor James Epperly, the show features insightful sermons, engaging interviews with prominent Christian figures, and heartfelt testimonials from individuals who have experienced life-changing transformations through faith. Each episode is designed to offer spiritual guidance, biblical wisdom, and practical advice for living a Christ-centered life. With its friendly and welcoming vibe, 'The James Epperly Show' aims to support viewers' spiritual development and enhance their connection with God, making it a treasured part of their weekly viewing schedule.

Charles, wife Peggy and daughter Annette share life changing truths.

programme.desc: "What greater honour and testimony is there than to be a devotedand passionate follower of the Lord Jesus Christ. She lives in the Orlando area with her husband, Jonathan Cain.

programme.title: The Counter Culture Mom Show
programme.desc: Former Hollywood actress, pop culture expert, Tina Griffin, left her Wisconsin dairy farm at the age of 20 and headed to Hollywood, CA to earn a BA in Film and Television broadcasting from California State University - Los Angeles. She’s traveled globally for the past 20 years delivering her eye-opening show, Hollywood Exposed https://counterculturemom.com/adult-session/ , explaining the real agenda behind the entertainment industry and its impact on the foundational development of today’s youth. Besides being in countless movies, Tina has worked on TV shows such as Jimmy Kimmel Live!, Young and the Restless, Days of Our Lives, Lizzie McGuire, Drake and Josh, and Malcolm in the Middle, competed in the Miss America pageant and worked at the OSCARS. She was involved with the Film Society as well as Women in Film and an active member of the Screen Actors Guild (SAG) and the American Federation of Television and Radio Artists (AFTRA). She has opened for bands such as Colton Dixon, Third Day, and Jeremy Camp. programme.title: The Mondo Show
programme.desc: I am so excited to introduce to you a new show. I would be honored for you to be a part of this brand new and exciting project! My new show is called “Mondo”. It’s a new TV show coming to the PTL Television Network available on ROKU, Apple TV, and Amazon Fire. This show is real, it’s raw, with an organic feel to the conversation. Sometimes I will be talking directly to you the audience, and at other times I will place you in the middle of the conversation, so you can experience what is really being said. The subject matter for the conversation and the questions will be the things people are afraid to ask, even though it is what everyone is thinking. I want you to meet the men and women who are making a difference in our communities, in our culture, and in our lives. It’s a journey to understand the misunderstood. It’s The Mondo Show.
